bird.name: 欧乌鸫
bird.summary: 欧乌鸫（學名：Turdus merula） 又称欧亚乌鸫，是鶇屬的一種鸟类。其下有多個亞種，分佈與歐、亞、非和北美洲，是瑞典的國鳥。後來又被引入澳大利亞和新西蘭，并成為了澳大利亞當地的入侵物種。欧乌鸫是一種留鳥，但有些地方的亞種也會進行遷徙。 欧乌鸫是一種雜食動物，以昆蟲和漿果…

locations.name: 博纳维斯塔
locations.summary: 博纳维斯塔（英語：Bonavista）是位于加拿大纽芬兰与拉布拉多省的一个市镇，位于纽芬兰岛的东海岸。不同于许多纽芬兰沿海的定居点，博纳维斯塔建在宽阔的平原上而不是位于陡峭的海湾，目前为止城镇的空间扩展到了31.5 km2（12.2 sq…

locations.name: List of birds of North America
locations.summary: The lists of birds in the light blue box below are divided by biological family.

relations.subject: 欧乌鸫
relations.evidence: The common blackbird breeds in temperate Eurasia, North Africa, the Canary Islands, and South Asia

relations.subject: 欧乌鸫
relations.evidence: maximus breeding at and remaining above even in winter. This widespread species has been recorded as a vagrant in many locations outside of its normal range in Eurasia, but records from North America are usually thought to be of escaped birds, such as the bird recorded in Quebec in 1971. However, a 1994 record from Bonavista, Newfoundland, has been accepted as a genuine wild bird, and the species is therefore on the North American list.{{cite web|title= The A.O.U

relations.evidence: maximus breeding at and remaining above even in winter. This widespread species has been recorded as a vagrant in many locations outside of its normal range in Eurasia, but records from North America are usually thought to be of escaped birds, such as the bird recorded in Quebec in 1971. However, a 1994 record from Bonavista, Newfoundland, has been accepted as a genuine wild bird, and the species is therefore on the North American list.{{cite web|title= The A.O.U

relations.subject: 欧乌鸫
relations.evidence: The species is not believed to approach the thresholds for the population decline criterion of the IUCN Red List (i.e., a decline of more than 30% in ten years or three generations), and is therefore categorised as least concern. In the western Palearctic, populations are generally stable or increasing, but there have been local declines, especially on farmland, which may be due to agricultural policies that encouraged farmers to remove hedgerows (which provide nesting places), and to drain damp grassland and increase the use of pesticides, both of which could have reduced the availability of invertebrate food. The common blackbird was introduced to Australia by a bird dealer visiting Melbourne in early 1857, and has since spread from Melbourne and Adelaide to include all of south-eastern Australia, including Tasmania and the Bass Strait islands. The introduced population in Australia is considered a pest because it damages a variety of soft fruits in orchards, parks and gardens, including berries, cherries, stone fruit and grapes.Clarke, G
relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。
